log: === ROUND 1 ===
--- Githyanki — Bardic Musician's turn ---
ACTION: Cast Hypnotic Pattern (Level 3 slot, 2 remaining). DC 16 WIS save. 30ft cube.
→ Frost Giant: WIS save [d20:16+3=19 vs DC 16] SUCCESS. Resists.
→ Ogre: WIS save [d20:19+-2=17 vs DC 16] SUCCESS. Resists.
→ Ogre: WIS save [d20:16+-2=14 vs DC 16] FAIL!
→ 1/3 targets affected.
--- Frost Giant's turn ---
Frost Giant attacks Githyanki — Bardic Musician with Greataxe: [d20:17+9=26 vs AC 14] HIT! 39 damage. Githyanki — Bardic Musician HP: 28/67
Frost Giant attacks Githyanki — Bardic Musician with Greataxe: [d20:8+9=17 vs AC 14] HIT! 20 damage. Githyanki — Bardic Musician HP: 8/67
--- Ogre's turn ---
Ogre attacks Githyanki — Bardic Musician with Greatclub: [d20:12+6=18 vs AC 14] HIT! 16 damage. Githyanki — Bardic Musician HP: 0/67
→ Githyanki — Bardic Musician loses concentration on Hypnotic Pattern! [CON save 8 vs DC 10]
=== ENCOUNTER ENDED — Winner: ENEMY after 1 rounds ===
